steps.title: Identify the relationship between acute angles
steps.content:
In a right triangle, the two acute angles are complementary, meaning they add to 90°.
If one acute angle is labeled 24°, then the other acute angle a satisfies
$$a + 24 = 90$$.

steps.title: Solve for a and select the answer
steps.content:
Subtract 24 from both sides:
$$a = 90 - 24 = 66$$.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
